items.name: Elizabeth Fry Society of Kingston
items.access_script: Hi, I am being released soon and will have nowhere to go. Do you have any supportive housing units available?

items.name: Employment Standards Information Centre
items.name_fr: Centre d'information sur les normes d'emploi
items.access_script: Call 1-800-531-5551 for information about Ontario’s Employment Standards Act (e.g., wages, hours of work, overtime, vacation rules). This free information line is available to both workers and employers.

items.name: Farmer Wellness Initiative
items.access_script: Ontario farmers, farm families, and farm workers can call 1-866-267-6255 to access free counselling support at any time. Intake is available 24/7 and no fees or paperwork are required.

items.name: Fem'aide
items.access_script: Francophone women facing violence can call or text 1-877-336-2433 for free, confidential support in French (24/7). If you are in immediate danger, call 911.

items.name: Four Directions Indigenous Student Centre
items.access_script: Email 4direct@queensu.ca or visit 144-146 Barrie St, Kingston, ON K7L 3J9. Student ID required. No fees.

items.name: Geneva Centre for Autism (Virtual)
items.access_script: Visit https://www.autism.net for information.

items.name: Good2Talk
items.access_script: Call 1-866-925-5454 or text GOOD2TALKON to 686868. No fees. If you are in immediate danger, call 911.

items.name: H'art Centre
items.access_script: Hi, I'm interested in your art programs for my sibling with a disability. Can we visit the studio?

items.name: Habitat for Humanity Kingston
items.access_script: Visit https://habitatkingston.com for information.

items.name: Habitat for Humanity Kingston ReStore
items.access_script: Hi, I have some furniture I'd like to donate. Do you offer pick-up services?

items.name: Health811 (formerly Telehealth Ontario)
items.access_script: Call 811 or visit https://health811.ontario.ca. OHIP card is helpful but not required. No fees.

items.name: Heart and Stroke Foundation
items.name_fr: Cœur + AVC (Fondation des maladies du cœur et de l'AVC)
items.access_script: Call 1-888-473-4636 for free, evidence-based information on heart disease and stroke. The Heart and Stroke Foundation’s help line can answer questions about prevention, risk factors, treatment, and recovery resources.

items.name: HIV & AIDS Legal Clinic Ontario (HALCO)
items.name_fr: Clinique juridique VIH & sida de l'Ontario (HALCO)
items.access_script: Ontario residents living with HIV or AIDS can call 1-888-705-8889 for free legal advice on issues like privacy, human rights, immigration, and income support. No fees are charged for this service.

items.name: Hope for Wellness Helpline
items.name_fr: Ligne d’écoute d’espoir pour le mieux-être
items.access_script: Hi, I am Indigenous and I'm having a hard time. I'd like to speak with a culturally safe counsellor.

items.name: Hope for Wellness Helpline
items.name_fr: Ligne d’écoute d’espoir pour le mieux-être
items.access_script: Call 855-242-3310. No fees. If you are in immediate danger, call 911.

items.name: Hospice Kingston (Providence Care)
items.access_script: Visit https://providencecare.ca/hospice-kingston for information.

items.name: Hospice Palliative Care Ontario (HPCO)
items.access_script: Call 1-833-621-0728 for information and navigation assistance with hospice and palliative care services in Ontario. (The HPCO information line is staffed Monday to Friday, 8:30 AM to 4:30 PM.)

items.name: Hotel Dieu Hospital Urgent Care Centre (KHSC)
items.name_fr: Centre de soins urgents de l'Hôpital Hôtel-Dieu
items.access_script: Hi, I think I have a minor bone break. Are you still accepting patients for today, or is capacity reached?

items.name: Hotel Dieu Hospital Urgent Care Centre (KHSC)
items.name_fr: Centre de soins urgents de l'hôpital Hôtel-Dieu (KHSC)
items.access_script: Call 613-546-1240 for assistance, or visit https://kingstonhsc.ca/programs-and-departments/urgent-care-centre.

items.name: Human Rights Legal Support Centre (HRLSC)
items.name_fr: Centre d'assistance juridique en matière de droits de la personne (CAJDP)
items.access_script: If you have experienced discrimination in Ontario, call 1-866-625-5179 for free legal advice and help filing a human rights application. The Human Rights Legal Support Centre’s services are provided at no cost.

items.name: In From the Cold Emergency Shelter
items.name_fr: Refuge d'urgence In From the Cold
items.access_script: Call 613-542-6672 or email info@kingstonhomebase.ca or visit 540 Montreal St, Kingston, ON K7K 3J2. No fees.

items.name: Indian Residential Schools Crisis Line
items.name_fr: Ligne de crise des pensionnats indiens
items.access_script: Former residential school students and their families can call 1-866-925-4419 for emotional crisis support at any time (24/7). If you are in immediate danger, call 911.

items.name: Indigenous Interprofessional Primary Care Team (IIPCT)
items.name_fr: Équipe de soins primaires interprofessionnels autochtones
items.access_script: Call 343-477-0256 or email info@iipct.com. OHIP Card required. Free.

items.name: Injured Workers Community Legal Clinic (IWC)
items.name_fr: Clinique juridique communautaire pour accidentés du travail (IWC)
items.access_script: Injured workers in Ontario can call 1-833-461-2411 for free legal help with workers’ compensation (WSIB) claims and appeals. The Injured Workers Community Legal Clinic provides assistance at no charge.

items.name: Integrated Care Hub (ICH)
items.access_script: Email hubcoordinator@kingston.net or visit 661 Montreal St, Kingston, ON K7K 3J4. No fees.

items.name: INVISTA Centre
items.access_script: Visit 1350 Gardiners Rd, Kingston, ON K7P 0E5. Fees: Varies.

items.name: Jobwell
items.access_script: Call 613-540-6165 ext. 34109 or email info@jobwell.ca. Application form required. No fees.

items.name: Jordan's Principle Call Centre
items.name_fr: Centre d'appel du Principe de Jordan
items.access_script: First Nations families can call 1-855-572-4453 (Jordan’s Principle Call Centre) for help accessing health, social, or education services for their children. The call centre is open 24/7 and there are no fees.

items.name: Justice for Children and Youth (JFCY)
items.access_script: Call 1-866-522-2024 or email info@jfcy.org. No fees.

items.name: Justice for Children and Youth (JFCY)
items.access_script: Young people in Ontario (under 18, or under 25 if homeless) can call 1-866-999-5329 for free legal advice. Justice for Children and Youth can help with issues in areas like education, family, youth criminal justice, and more.

items.name: KEYS Job Centre
items.access_script: Hi, I'm looking for work and need help with my resume. Can I book an appointment with a counsellor?

items.name: KEYS Job Centre
items.access_script: Call 613-546-5559 for assistance, or visit https://keys.ca.

items.name: KFL&A Children's Services
items.access_script: Visit https://www.cityofkingston.ca for information.

items.name: KFL&A Indigenous Primary Health Care Team
items.name_fr: Équipe de soins de santé primaires autochtones de KFL&A
items.access_script: Call 343-477-0256 or email info@iipct.com. OHIP required. No fees.

items.name: KFL&A Public Health - Immunization
items.access_script: Call 613-549-1232 for assistance, or visit https://www.kflaph.ca.

items.name: KFL&A Public Health Dental Services
items.name_fr: Services dentaires de santé publique KFL&A
items.access_script: Hi, I have a severe toothache and I am on Ontario Works. Can I book an emergency appointment?

items.name: KFL&A Public Health: Sexual Health Clinic
items.name_fr: Santé publique KFL&A : Clinique de santé sexuelle
items.access_script: Hi, I'd like to get tested for STIs. Do I need an appointment or can I just walk in?

items.name: KFL&A Public Health: Sexual Health Clinic
items.name_fr: Clinique de santé sexuelle de santé publique KFL&A
items.access_script: Call 613-549-1232 ext. 1275 for assistance, or visit https://www.kflaph.ca/en/clinics-and-classes/sexual-health-clinics.aspx.

items.name: KFPL - Calvin Park Branch
items.access_script: Email contact@kfpl.ca or visit 88 Wright Crescent, Kingston, ON K7L 4T9. Library Card for loans required. No fees.

items.name: KFPL - Isabel Turner Branch
items.access_script: Email contact@kfpl.ca or visit 935 Gardiners Rd, Kingston, ON K7M 9A9. Library Card for loans required. No fees.
